title: Poecilostachys bakeri
taxonomy: Poecilostachys bakeri is a plant species within the family Poaceae. It is a type of grass that belongs to the genus Poecilostachys. The classification of Poecilostachys bakeri is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade angiosperms, clade monocots, clade commelinids, clade Poaceae. Further classification includes order Poales, suborder Chloridoideae, and tribe Eragrostideae. Poecilostachys bakeri is a plant native to South Africa.
